lessons.name: Unit 2: City Life
lessons.description: Learn about city life with double comparatives and phrasal verbs.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
City features: skyscraper, building, traffic, public transport, metro, subway, bus, taxi, shopping mall, entertainment, facilities, infrastructure

City problems: pollution, noise, traffic jam, crowded, expensive, stressful, crime, poverty

City advantages: convenient, modern, developed, opportunity, job, education, healthcare, entertainment

Adjectives: busy, crowded, noisy, polluted, expensive, modern, convenient, exciting, stressful, fast-paced

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about city life, urban problems, and city advantages.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
A. Double Comparatives (So sánh kép)

Cấu trúc: The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V

Nghĩa: Càng... càng...

1. Với tính từ/trạng từ ngắn:

  • The + adj/adv-er + S + V, the + adj/adv-er + S + V
  • Ex: The bigger the city is, the more crowded it is.
  • Ex: The faster you drive, the more dangerous it is.

2. Với tính từ/trạng từ dài:

  • The more + adj/adv + S + V, the more + adj/adv + S + V
  • Ex: The more expensive the city is, the more difficult life is.

3. Kết hợp:

  • The + adj-er + S + V, the more + adj + S + V
  • Ex: The older I get, the more experienced I become.

4. Với danh từ:

  • The more + N + S + V, the more + N + S + V
  • Ex: The more money you have, the more problems you face.

B. Phrasal Verbs (Cụm động từ)

Common phrasal verbs:

  • get around: đi lại, di chuyển
  • grow up: lớn lên
  • come back: quay lại
  • go on: tiếp tục
  • take off: cất cánh (máy bay)
  • put on: mặc vào
  • take over: tiếp quản
  • deal with: giải quyết
  • run out of: hết, cạn kiệt
  • keep up with: theo kịp

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Double Comparatives - Tính từ ngắn
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • The + adj-er + S + V, the + adj-er + S + V
  • Tính từ ngắn: 1-2 âm tiết

examples.question: The city is big. It is crowded. → The ______ the city is, the ______ it is.
examples.solution: The bigger the city is, the more crowded it is.

examples.question: You drive fast. It is dangerous. → The ______ you drive, the ______ it is.
examples.solution: The faster you drive, the more dangerous it is.

examples.question: The weather is hot. I feel tired. → The ______ the weather is, the ______ I feel.
examples.solution: The hotter the weather is, the more tired I feel.
examples.explanation: hot → hotter (nhân đôi phụ âm); tired (dài) → more tired

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Double Comparatives - Tính từ dài
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • The more + adj + S + V, the more + adj + S + V
  • Tính từ dài: 3+ âm tiết

examples.question: The city is expensive. Life is difficult. → The ______ the city is, the ______ life is.
examples.solution: The more expensive the city is, the more difficult life is.
examples.explanation: expensive → more expensive; difficult → more difficult

examples.question: You are careful. You make fewer mistakes. → The ______ you are, the ______ mistakes you make.
examples.solution: The more careful you are, the fewer mistakes you make.

examples.question: It is polluted. It is unhealthy. → The ______ it is, the ______ it is.
examples.solution: The more polluted it is, the more unhealthy it is.
examples.explanation: polluted → more polluted; unhealthy → more unhealthy

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Phrasal Verbs - Meaning
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Học thuộc nghĩa của phrasal verbs
  • Chọn phrasal verb phù hợp với ngữ cảnh

examples.question: It's easy to ______ in this city. (đi lại)
examples.solution: It's easy to get around in this city.
examples.explanation: get around = đi lại, di chuyển

examples.question: We need to ______ this problem. (giải quyết)
examples.solution: We need to deal with this problem.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Kết hợp Double Comparatives và Phrasal Verbs
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Sử dụng cả so sánh kép và phrasal verbs
  • Chú ý ngữ cảnh câu

examples.question: The city grows. It is harder to ______. (get around)
examples.solution: The more the city grows, the harder it is to get around.
examples.explanation: So sánh kép + phrasal verb 'get around'

examples.question: You ______ problems. You become stronger. (deal with)
examples.solution: The more problems you deal with, the stronger you become.
examples.explanation: So sánh kép + phrasal verb 'deal with'

examples.question: The city is big. It's difficult to ______ changes. (keep up with)
examples.solution: The bigger the city is, the more difficult it is to keep up with changes.
examples.explanation: So sánh kép + phrasal verb 'keep up with'

exercises.question: The bigger the city is, the ______ it is.
exercises.explanation: crowded (dài) → more crowded

exercises.question: The ______ you drive, the more dangerous it is.
exercises.explanation: fast → faster

exercises.question: The more expensive the city is, the ______ life is.
exercises.explanation: difficult (dài) → more difficult

exercises.question: The ______ the weather is, the more tired I feel.
exercises.explanation: hot → hotter (nhân đôi phụ âm)

exercises.question: I ______ in Hanoi.
exercises.explanation: grow up = lớn lên (quá khứ: grew up)

exercises.question: It's easy to ______ in this city.
exercises.explanation: get around = đi lại, di chuyển

exercises.question: We need to ______ this problem.
exercises.explanation: deal with = giải quyết

exercises.question: The older I get, the ______ I become.
exercises.explanation: experienced (dài) → more experienced

exercises.question: We are ______ time.
exercises.explanation: run out of = hết, cạn kiệt

exercises.question: It's hard to ______ the changes.
exercises.explanation: keep up with = theo kịp

exercises.question: Which are correct double comparatives? (Select all that apply)
options: The more expensive, the more difficult.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: bigger/better, more expensive/more difficult, hotter/more tired. Sai: dangerouser (phải là 'more dangerous')

exercises.question: Which phrasal verbs mean 'đi lại' or 'di chuyển'? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: get around = đi lại. grow up = lớn lên; come back = quay lại; go on = tiếp tục

exercises.question: Which sentences are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: The bigger the city, the more crowded it is.
The more fast you drive, the dangerous it is.
The older I get, the wiser I become.
The more money, the more problems.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: bigger/more crowded, older/wiser, more money/more problems. Sai: more fast (phải là 'faster'), the dangerous (thiếu 'more')

exercises.question: Fill in: The ______ (big) the city is, the ______ (crowded) it is.
exercises.explanation: big → bigger; crowded → more crowded

exercises.question: Fill in: The ______ (expensive) the city is, the ______ (difficult) life is.
exercises.explanation: expensive → more expensive; difficult → more difficult

exercises.question: Fill in phrasal verb: I ______ (lớn lên) in Hanoi.
exercises.explanation: grow up = lớn lên (quá khứ: grew up)

exercises.question: Fill in phrasal verb: We need to ______ (giải quyết) this problem.
exercises.explanation: deal with = giải quyết

exercises.question: Rearrange: bigger / The / city / the / is / , / more / the / crowded / is / it / .
exercises.sample_answer: The bigger the city is, the more crowded it is.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V

exercises.question: Transform: The city is big. It is crowded. → The ______, the ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The bigger the city is, the more crowded it is.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: big → bigger; crowded → more crowded

exercises.question: Transform: You drive fast. It is dangerous. → The ______, the ______.
exercises.sample_answer: The faster you drive, the more dangerous it is.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: fast → faster; dangerous → more dangerous

exercises.question: Rearrange with phrasal verb: up / I / grew / in / Hanoi / . / around / easy / It's / get / to / in / city / this / .
exercises.sample_answer: I grew up in Hanoi. It's easy to get around in this city.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: grew up (lớn lên), get around (đi lại)

exercises.question: Transform and combine: The city grows. It is harder to get around. (Use double comparative)
exercises.sample_answer: The more the city grows, the harder it is to get around.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: grows → more...grows; harder → harder. Kết hợp với phrasal verb 'get around'
